case_title: SANRIO INC. VS GIANNINI, SANDRA DBA KID'S COTTAGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,439.21 FILED BY SANRIO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GIANNINI, SANDRA DBA KID'S COTTAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GIANNINI, SANDRA DBA KID'S COTTAGE
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANRIO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIANNINI, SANDRA DBA KID'S COTTAGE $1,439.21 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,478.21, PLFT & DEFT SETTLED DEFT WILL PAY PLFT $180 PER MO 15TH MAY, JUNE JULY AUG SEPT OCT NOV DEC PLUS INT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PET. TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
